mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_targets (id, notice_id, target_type, target_value) VALUES (#{id}, #{noticeId}, #{noticeTargetType}, #{targetValue})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT u.id FROM users u WHERE u.enabled = TRUE AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notice_targets nt WHERE nt.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND nt.target_type = 'ALL' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notice_targets nt WHERE nt.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND nt.target_type = 'ROLE' AND nt.target_value = u.role ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notice_targets nt JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = nt.target_value WHERE nt.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND nt.target_type = 'GROUP' AND gm.user_id = u.id ) )
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notice_receipts (id, notice_id, user_id, delivered_at, read_at) VALUES
(#{r.id}, #{r.noticeId}, #{r.userId}, #{r.deliveredAt}, #{r.readAt})
ON CONFLICT (notice_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
